def sort_on_occurrence(lst):
    first_elements = [t[0] for t in lst]
    first_indices = [i for i, element in enumerate(first_elements)]
    new_list = []
    for i, t in enumerate(lst):
        new_t = (t[0], t[1], first_indices[i])
        new_list.append(new_t)
    new_list.sort(key=lambda x: x[2])
    return new_list
